_comment: Real shape the host sends to a before_save hook. contentId is 0 on create; populated with the existing ID on update. The plugin should return a JSON object containing (at most) customFields; the host ignores other fields in the result.
title: My Product

customFields._comment_regular_vs_system: price is a regular custom field. internal_sku and sync_status are system fields (defined in the post type schema with system = true). Plugins can read and write both, but only via the before_save hook.
